title: 24 Upcoming Dividend Increases
text: All stocks have at least five fiscal years of dividend growth history and come from the U.S. Dividend Champions List. They have an average increase of 9.5% and a median increase of 6.5%.

title: Walmart, Home Depot Among 15 Companies To Announce Dividend Increases In Second Half Of February
text: When it comes to annual dividend increases, February is the highlight of the year. There were at least 27 dividend boosts that were announced from a wide variety of companies. Widely held companies 3M, PepsiCo, and Coca-Cola all boosted their dividends in the first half of the month, with Pepsi announcing a 10% increase.

title: 5 Stocks In The Dividend Growth Sweet Spot
text: Finding companies with a high initial yield and rapid dividend growth is difficult. I present my criteria for finding such companies. At present, there are 16 companies meeting my initial screening requirements. Using additional metrics, these are reduced to five.

title: Analyzing My Market-Beating DGI Portfolio: I Must Be Doing Something REIT
text: I perform a deep dive analysis of my dividend growth income portfolio for which I currently provide monthly income updates. In the past 12 months, this portfolio has beaten the S&P 500 by a noticeable margin.

title: Corning (GLW) Rewards Shareholders With Modest Dividend Hike
text: A steady dividend payout with periodic increase is part of Corning's (GLW) long-term strategy to provide attractive risk-adjusted returns to its stockholders.

title: Corning Announces Increase in Quarterly Dividend
text: CORNING, N.Y., Feb. 08, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Corning Incorporated's (NYSE: GLW) Board of Directors today declared a quarterly dividend of $0.28 per share, a 3.7% increase versus the company's previous quarterly common stock dividend of $0.27. The dividend will be payable on March 30, 2023, to shareholders of record on Feb. 28, 2023.

title: West Expands Corning Collaboration and Launches First Product
text: West Ready Pack™ with Corning Valor® RTU Vials utilizing Stevanato Group's EZ-fill® technology EXTON, Pa. , Feb. 8, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. (NYSE: WST), a global leader in innovative solutions for injectable drug administration, today announces the expansion of its landmark collaboration with Corning Incorporated (NYSE: GLW), that now includes the exclusive distribution rights for Corning Valor® Glass vials and the launch of its first product, West Ready Pack™ with Corning Valor® RTU Vials utilizing SG EZ-fill® technology.

title: My Dividend Growth Income - January 2023 Update
text: Dividends received in January totaled $451. Forward dividend income grew by $1,171, translating to M/M growth of 26.08%.
